English: Just listen to me. There's something you need to know about that girl... ...

Japanese: ゆうべ、オレたちの実験室から 毒薬を盗みやがったのさ。
English: Last night, someone stole some poison from our lab.

Japanese: ど‥‥ドクヤク‥‥？
English: P-Poison...?

Japanese: ‥‥半年前にも、薬品のサンプルが なくなったことがあった‥‥
English: The same thing happened eight months ago. A drug sample was stolen.

Japanese: あのときも、実験室に アイツが来ていた。
English: She came to the lab that time, too.

Japanese: 盗んだの‥‥アイツしか 考えられないんだよ！
English: It could only have been her! That girl is a thief!

Japanese: ‥‥やめてくれッ！
English: Stop it!

Japanese: 彼女のコト‥‥ そんなふうに言うなッ！
English: D-Don't talk about her like that!

Japanese: ‥‥ホントにそう言ったのね？ 呑田　菊三さんは‥‥。
English: Is it true? Did he really say that?

Japanese: ば‥‥バカな‥‥！
English: Th-That's ridiculous!

Japanese: それに‥‥あの日。 アイツをつきとばしたあと‥‥
English: There's one more thing... After I pushed him that day...

Japanese: シンパイになって、 あそこに戻ったら‥‥
English: I got worried and came back to have a look.

Japanese: 現場に‥‥ ちいちゃんがいました。
English: And she was there... Dollie was right there.

Japanese: ‥‥アイツのそばに しゃがみこんで‥‥
English: She was crouched down next to him...

Japanese: なんですって！
English: What!?

Japanese: そのコト‥‥“証言しないで”って ちいちゃんに言われてたから‥‥
English: She told me not to ever tell anyone about it, but...

Japanese: ‥‥ゴメンなさい！
English: I'm sorry, Dollie!

Japanese: さ、裁判長！　こんな‥‥ 被告人の言うことなど‥‥
English: Y-Your Honor! This is... The defendant is...

Japanese: 千尋さん！　教えてよ！
English: Miss Fey! You tell them!

Japanese: ちいちゃんは‥‥ちがうよね！ ハンニンなんかじゃ‥‥
English: D-Dollie didn't do it... Sh-She's innocent!

Japanese: （‥‥やはり、美柳　ちなみは 半年前にも、毒薬を盗んでいた）
English: (So Dahlia stole poison eight months ago too, huh...)

Japanese: （そして、なるほどくんの 証言を考えれば‥‥）
English: (If you put that together with Mr. Wright's testimony...)

Japanese: （コタエは、１つしかない！）
English: (...then there's only one possible conclusion!)

Japanese: 被告人の証言によると、 証人・美柳　ちなみは‥‥、
English: The defense believes that Ms. Dahlia Hawthorne...

Japanese: 呑田　菊三さんが殺害される 前の晩に、毒薬を盗んでいます。
English: ...stole some poison on the night before she killed Doug Swallow.

Japanese: 事件の‥‥前の晩‥‥！
English: The night before...!?

Japanese: その目的は、モチロン‥‥ だれかを殺害するためです！
English: Naturally, her motive for stealing it was to kill someone!

Japanese: ‥‥千尋さん‥‥
English: Miss Fey...

Japanese: ‥‥そこまで言うのなら‥‥ 弁護人にうかがいましょう。
English: If you're so certain of your theory, then let me ask you this.

Japanese: （‥‥これが、最後のコタエ。 よく考えるの‥‥）
English: (Mia, this is your last chance. Think carefully now...)

Japanese: （彼女には‥‥どうしても取り戻し たい“あるもの”があった‥‥）
English: (There's something that she desperately wanted to get back... Therefore...)

Japanese: 美柳　ちなみさんは、だれの 殺害を計画していたのですかッ！
English: Exactly who was Ms. Dahlia Hawthorne planning to kill?

Japanese: どういうつもりですかな、 弁護人‥‥
English: Are you trying to mock this court, Ms. Fey?

Japanese: な、なんぢゃい！
English: Wh-What are you doing!?

Japanese: あんなに自信たっぷりに ヒトサシ指をつきつけておいて‥‥
English: You sounded so sure of yourself at first...

Japanese: まだ、事件の真相が見えて なかったのかいッ！
English: Now it turns out you have no idea what you're talking about!

Japanese: ご、ごぶさたしてるものですから。 法廷に立つの‥‥。
English: W-Well it's been a long time since I've been in court...

Japanese: アイサツがわりのペナルティです！ ‥‥ちゃんと考えるように！
English: That will cost you, Ms. Fey! Now think more carefully!

Japanese: スミマセン‥‥。 （まちがいはユルされないわ！）
English: I apologize, Your Honor... (No more mistakes, Mia!)

Japanese: ま、待つんぢゃ、千尋クン！ なぜ、呑田　菊三なのぢゃ？
English: W-Wait a minute, Mia! Why would she want to kill Doug Swallow?

Japanese: 呑田さんは、あのオンナの正体に 気づいてしまった！　だから‥‥
English: Because Doug Swallow had figured out what kind of a person she was! And so...

Japanese: いやいや。しかし、美柳　ちなみは それを知らなかったはずぢゃ。
English: No, no! Well, that may be true, but Ms. Hawthorne had no way of knowing that.

Japanese: ‥‥彼女にとって、本当に ジャマだったのはダレか？
English: From her point of view, who was it that was really in her way?

Japanese: ‥‥それを、よおく考えるんぢゃ。
English: THAT is the question you have to ask yourself.

Japanese: ‥‥弁護人。
English: Ms. Fey.

Japanese: そろそろ、結論を 聞かせていただきたいですな。
English: I'm beginning to run out of patience with you. What is your answer?

Japanese: は、はい‥‥。 （まちがいはユルされないわ！）
English: Y-Yes, Your Honor! (I can't mess up again!)

Japanese: そこまで！
English: That's enough!

Japanese: 本法廷は、これ以上の審議の 必要性を認めません。
English: This court sees no reason to further prolong the trial.

Japanese: さらに、被告に対する判決を 決める時間も、必要としません。
English: Nor is there any need for more time to decide the case against the defendant.

Japanese: これは、きわめて明白な事件です。 疑問の余地はない！
English: This case is extremely clear. I see no room for mis- interpretation of the facts.

Japanese: 被告人、成歩堂　龍一に たった今、判決を言いわたします！
English: This court finds the defendant, Phoenix Wright...

Japanese: 被告人はこれより身柄を 司直に預けるものとし、
English: The accused will surrender to the court immediately...

Japanese: １ヶ月以内に、高等裁判所において 通常裁判を受けることとします。
English: ...to be held pending trial at a higher court within a month from today's date.

Japanese: では、本日はこれにて閉廷！
English: That is all. This court is adjourned!
